zh.Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾布洛布恩
zh.Liston, Essex, England, Great Britain: 英國英格蘭艾可利斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Saye於大約1469年出生時，他的父親Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant55歲，母親Elizabeth Cheney48歲。他於1474年與Johanna Cheney在英國英格蘭艾可利斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1480年享年12歲。

zh-hans.Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾布洛布恩
zh-hans.Liston, Essex, England, Great Britain: 英国英格兰艾可利斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Saye于大约1469年出生时，他的父亲Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant55岁，母亲Elizabeth Cheney48岁。他于1474年与Johanna Cheney在英国英格兰艾可利斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1480年享年12岁。

nameMeanings.name: Saye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Slovenian Saje: nickname for someone with very dark, sooty hair, derived from the root of sajast ‘sooty’, or directly from saja ‘soot’.
West African (Liberia): from the personal name Saye, found among the Mano (Mah) people, denoting a first-born boy.

variants.name: Say
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Sai in Orne or Say in Indre, France, perhaps so called from a Gaulish personal name Saius + the Latin locative suffix -acum (see also French name 3 below).

English: nickname, perhaps for someone who made or sold say, a type of woollen cloth, or for an habitual wearer of clothes made of this material, from Middle English sai(e) ‘say’ (Old French saie, from Latin saga, plural of sagum ‘military cloak’). See also Sayer .

French (southern): topographic name from saix (from Latin saxum) ‘rock’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example, Say in Loire, Saix in Tarn and Vienne, Le Saix in Hautes-Alpes, or Les Saix in Isère.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Saye was born about 1469, his father, Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant, was 55 and his mother, Elizabeth Cheney, was 48. He married Johanna Cheney in 1474, in Liston, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1480, at the age of 12.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Saye est né environ 1469, son père, Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Cheney, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Cheney en 1474, à Liston, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1480, à l’âge de 12 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Saye um 1469 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant 55 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Cheney 48. Er hat 1474 in Liston, Essex, England, United Kingdom Johanna Cheney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1480 im Alter von 12 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Saye è nato il circa 1469, il suo padre, Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Cheney, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Cheney nel 1474, nel Liston, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1480, all'età di 12 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Sayeが約1469年に生まれた時，父Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeantは55歳，母Elizabeth Cheneyは48歳であった。1474年にイギリスイギリスエセックスリストンでJohanna Cheneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1480年に12歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Saye(이)가 대략 1469년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Cheney(은)는 48세였다. 그는 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리스턴에서 Johanna Cheney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1480년 12세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Liston, Essex, England, Great Britain: Liston, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Saye nasceu aproximadamente 1469, seu pai, Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Cheney, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Cheney em 1474, em Liston, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1480, com 12 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Saye родился около 1469 г., его отцу по имени Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Cheney, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Cheney в 1474 г. в местности листон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1480 г. в возрасте 12 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Saye nació aproximadamente 1469, su papá, Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Cheney, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Johanna Cheney en 1474, en Liston, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1480, a la edad de 12 años.
